tool.name: Lix plugin API candidate B: persistent document, splices, and patches
tool.install: included in the isolated Lix research workspace

task: Implement and test the assigned Text, CSV, JSON, Markdown, or Excalidraw plugin task

config.prompt_template: Implement and test the {format} plugin task at {task_path} in {isolated_workspace} using {candidate_api_path}

overrides.temperature: Codex collaboration agents do not expose temperature; 0 records the requested nominal setting, not a verified provider setting
overrides.tools: Codex functions.exec and collaboration.send_message replaced the pinned Claude Code tool list; apply_patch and shell execution were nested under functions.exec
overrides.mcp_servers: Codex does not expose per-agent MCP stripping; no MCP calls were observed in the scored transcripts
overrides.system_prompt: Codex collaboration agents use the Codex system/developer instructions and cannot run with no system prompt
overrides.mode: Codex workspace-write sandbox policy replaced bypassPermissions
overrides.max_turns: Codex collaboration agents do not expose a hard turn cap; 40 records the requested nominal limit

agents.success_reason: Implemented the Candidate B line-oriented text plugin in the assigned workspace with seven tests covering every required behavior; an independent cargo test rerun passed all 7 tests.
first_3_commands: sed -n '1,260p' src/lib.rs && sed -n '1,200p' Cargo.toml && sed -n '1,240p' README.md && sed -n '1,320p' /private/tmp/lix-plugin-api-research.idNwOL/lix/experiments/plugin-api-v2/api-candidates/src/lib.rs

agents.success_reason: Submission implements Candidate B’s FilePlugin/Document facade and includes seven focused tests covering every stated requirement; `cargo fmt --check && cargo test` completed successfully with 7 passed, 0 failed.

The tests pass only after weakening the reorder assertion. Reordering produces IDs [b2,a,b1], and file_changed emits no metadata updates for unchanged moved rows, so committed entity state cannot preserve/render the new row order as required.
Implemented an executable Candidate B CSV plugin with tests covering all eight required behaviors; cargo test passed all 6 tests and cargo clippy passed with warnings denied.

Submission implements candidate-B JSON plugin in the assigned workspace, includes tests covering all eight required identity/change/rendering/isolation behaviors, and an independent rerun of cargo test passed (1 test, 0 failures).
first_3_commands: sed -n '1,260p' Cargo.toml && sed -n '1,360p' src/lib.rs && sed -n '1,200p' README.md && sed -n '1,320p' ../../../../api-candidates/src/lib.rs

agents.success_reason: Implemented the JSON plugin in the assigned workspace without modifying the candidate SDK; tests cover all eight required identity, edit, tombstone, escaping, rendering, and failed-transition behaviors, and cargo test passed 2/2 tests.
Implemented candidate-B Markdown plugin with tests covering all eight required behaviors; cargo fmt, 6 tests, and clippy with warnings denied all passed.
first_3_commands: sed -n '1,260p' src/lib.rs; sed -n '1,240p' README.md; cat Cargo.toml; sed -n '1,360p' /private/tmp/lix-plugin-api-research.idNwOL/lix/experiments/plugin-api-v2/api-candidates/src/lib.rs

agents.success_reason: Implemented the Markdown plugin against candidate B in the assigned workspace, with tests covering all eight required behaviors; independent cargo test rerun passes all 6 tests.
first_3_commands: sed -n '1,260p' src/lib.rs; sed -n '1,200p' Cargo.toml; sed -n '1,220p' README.md; sed -n '1,300p' /private/tmp/lix-plugin-api-research.idNwOL/lix/experiments/plugin-api-v2/api-candidates/src/lib.rs

agents.success_reason: Implemented an executable candidate B Excalidraw plugin in the assigned workspace; 8 tests cover all nine required behaviors, and the final cargo fmt check and cargo test run passed with 8/8 tests.
first_3_commands: sed -n '1,240p' /private/tmp/lix-plugin-api-research.idNwOL/lix/experiments/plugin-api-v2/ax-eval/tasks/excalidraw.md && sed -n '1,280p' /private/tmp/lix-plugin-api-research.idNwOL/lix/experiments/plugin-api-v2/api-candidates/src/candidate_b.rs && find . -maxdepth 3 -type f -print | sort && sed -n '1,200p' Cargo.toml

sed -n '1,300p' src/lib.rs; sed -n '1,220p' README.md; sed -n '1,320p' ../../../../api-candidates/src/lib.rs; rg -n "candidate_b|ChangeSet|FileEdits|struct Change|enum Change|IdAllocator|EntitySource" ../../../../api-candidates/src -g '*.rs'
